parsedJson.summary: The provided screenshots are completely blank white images, indicating a critical technical failure or missing content that prevents any design evaluation.

issues.title: Screenshots are completely blank
issues.what_observed: Both the desktop and mobile screenshots provided are entirely white rectangles with no visible text, images, buttons, or navigation elements.
issues.why_problem: A visitor landing on a blank page assumes the website is broken, the business is closed, or it is a scam. There is zero opportunity to build trust or capture a lead because there is no content to view.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A fully rendered homepage with a clear headline, a visible phone number in the header, and a hero image of a roof or team member.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Verify the website URL and hosting status immediately. If the site is live, ensure the screenshots capture the actual rendered HTML/CSS. If the site is blank, this is a server-side emergency requiring immediate IT intervention.
issues.plain_explanation: 您提供的图片完全是空白的，我看不到任何网站内容。这就像一家商店的橱窗被白纸遮住了，路人根本不知道里面卖什么。
issues.customer_impact: 如果网站真的显示为空白，您的潜在客户流失率是 100%。没有人会拨打一个他们无法看到电话号码的公司的电话。这直接导致所有广告费和自然搜索流量浪费。

redesign_priorities: 1. Resolve the technical issue causing the blank display immediately.
2. Re-capture screenshots of the actual live website for a proper audit.
3. Ensure the site loads correctly on both mobile and desktop browsers.
